evals.prompt: 이 use case port 설계가 괜찮은지 봐줘. port 메서드가 findByDeletedFalseAndStatusIn처럼 JPA query method 이름을 그대로 쓰고 있어.
evals.expected_output: JPA/adapter assumption이 application port에 누출되었다고 지적하고, application need 중심의 port 이름과 signature를 제안한다.
assertions: The output identifies the JPA query method naming as an adapter leak.
The output proposes a port contract named around application intent rather than persistence mechanics.
The output keeps concrete repository or JPA details outside the application port.

evals.prompt: 여러 모듈에서 쓰는 문자열 정규화 유틸을 packages/shared-text에 두려고 해. shared kernel로 봐도 될까?
evals.expected_output: technical utility는 shared kernel이 아니라 common/support module 후보라고 판단하고, shared를 DDD 공유 개념에만 쓰도록 권고한다.
assertions: The output distinguishes shared kernel concepts from technical common/support utilities.
The output recommends a common/support module name instead of a shared-* module.
The output explains the boundary in terms of domain language or dependency responsibility.

evals.prompt: 이 도메인 객체는 값만 들고 있는데 record로 만들지 class로 만들지 결정해줘. 생성 시 정규화와 실패 누적 검증이 필요할 수도 있어.
evals.expected_output: transparent immutable carrier면 record를 고려하되, invariant, normalization, identity, lifecycle, framework construction이 있으면 class가 낫다고 판단한다.
assertions: The output ties record/class choice to invariants, normalization, identity, lifecycle, or framework constraints.
The output avoids choosing a Java feature only because it is newer.
The output asks for or states the public contract before recommending convenience methods.
